curriculum.title: The Spark
curriculum.coachNote: Focus on high-contrast colors. Keep it very encouraging.

curriculum.title: The Sensory Hub
curriculum.coachNote: Ask Gladys what the object smells like. Add 2 new stops.

curriculum.title: The Action Move
curriculum.coachNote: Make the objects move! A spinning pizza, a dancing duck.

curriculum.title: The Scale Up
curriculum.coachNote: Start moving into a second room of the house.

curriculum.title: The Master Walk
curriculum.coachNote: The big challenge: Walk through all 10 items backwards.

curriculum.title: The Palace Wipe
curriculum.coachNote: Teach the 'fresh breeze' technique to clear the palace for new memories.

curriculum.title: Real World Utility
curriculum.coachNote: Use the palace for a real 5-item grocery list.
